game.name: Star Wars: Episode I Racer
game.desc: Star Wars: Episode I Racer is a 1999 racing game developed by LucasArts based on the podracing sequence from The Phantom Menace. Pilot high-speed podracers across eight planets in single-player tournament mode, with 23 selectable pilots and 25 tracks. The OpenSWE1R port mixes x86 CPU emulation (Unicorn) with Win32 API reimplementation to run the original Windows executable cross-platform.
